description.content: Real-time and historical price endpoints for single and multi-symbol queries.
Returns the latest aggregated price for a single source cryptocurrency converted into one or more target currencies. Uses CCCAGG by default.

query.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

response.name: Mapping of target symbol to current price.

description.content: Returns the latest aggregated prices for multiple source cryptocurrencies converted into multiple target currencies in a single call.

query.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

response.name: Nested mapping of from-symbol to to-symbol to price.

description.content: Returns full ticker data (price, 24h volume, high, low, open, change, market cap) for multiple from-symbols and to-symbols in one call. Same envelope is used by the CCCAGG WebSocket index.

query.description: When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

response.name: Object with RAW and DISPLAY sections per pair.

description.content: Computes a custom average across a chosen set of exchanges for a single cryptocurrency pair (CUSTOMAGG).

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated list of exchanges to include in the average.

description.content: Returns the price of a cryptocurrency at a given historical timestamp. Falls back to the closest available candle close.

query.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the desired historical price.
When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

description.content: Historical OHLCV candle data by day, hour, and minute.
Returns daily OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair, ordered ascending by timestamp. Up to 2000 data points per call.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.
When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

description.content: Returns hourly OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair. Up to 2000 data points per call.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.
When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

description.content: Returns minute OHLCV candles for a cryptocurrency pair. Up to 2000 data points per call and up to 7 days of history on the free tier.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Time-period aggregation factor (e.g. 5 returns 5-minute candles for histominute).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.
When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

description.content: Top list endpoints by 24h volume, market cap, exchange volume, and pair volume.

item.name: Get Top List by Total Volume (Full Data)

request.name: Get Top List by Total Volume (Full Data)

description.content: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by 24-hour total volume converted into a target currency, including full ticker data per coin.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).
Zero-indexed page number for paginated top-list endpoints.
(Required) Quote currency for the volume conversion.

response.name: List of coins with CoinInfo, RAW, and DISPLAY blocks.

item.name: Get Top List by Market Cap (Full Data)

request.name: Get Top List by Market Cap (Full Data)

description.content: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by market capitalization with full ticker data per coin.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).
Zero-indexed page number for paginated top-list endpoints.
(Required) Quote currency for the market-cap conversion.

item.name: Get Top Exchanges by Pair Volume

request.name: Get Top Exchanges by Pair Volume

description.content: Returns the top exchanges ranked by 24-hour volume for a given pair.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

item.name: Get Top Exchanges (Full Data) by Pair Volume

request.name: Get Top Exchanges (Full Data) by Pair Volume

description.content: Returns the top exchanges by 24-hour pair volume with full ticker data per exchange.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

description.content: Returns the top cryptocurrencies by aggregate 24-hour volume against a given quote currency. Lighter payload than totalvolfull.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

description.content: Returns the most active trading pairs for a given from-symbol across every integrated exchange.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

description.content: Crypto news articles, sources, and categories.
Returns the most recent cryptocurrency news articles aggregated from every integrated source. Filterable by language, source, and category.

query.description: ISO 639-1 language code. Defaults to EN.
Comma-separated list of source feed keys.
Comma-separated list of categories to exclude.
Latest timestamp (seconds) to return articles before.

response.name: List of news articles with source and category metadata.

description.content: Returns the list of news source feeds available for filtering.
Returns the list of news categories used for tagging articles.
Returns both available source feeds and categories in a single call.
Social statistics for coins and assets.
Returns the latest aggregated social statistics (Twitter, Reddit, code repository) for a single coin identified by its CryptoCompare coin ID.

item.name: Get Historical Daily Coin Social Stats

request.name: Get Historical Daily Coin Social Stats

description.content: Returns daily historical social statistics for a coin.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

item.name: Get Historical Hourly Coin Social Stats

request.name: Get Historical Hourly Coin Social Stats

description.content: Returns hourly historical social statistics for a coin.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

description.content: Top-of-book order book data across integrated exchanges.

item.name: Get Order Book Top of Book

request.name: Get Order Book Top of Book

description.content: Returns the top of the order book (best bid and ask) for one or more pairs across one or more exchanges. Requires an API key on most tiers.
Exchange metadata and exchange-pair listings.

item.name: Get Top Exchanges by Pair Volume

request.name: Get Top Exchanges by Pair Volume

description.content: Returns the top exchanges ranked by 24-hour volume for a given pair.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

item.name: Get Top Exchanges (Full Data) by Pair Volume

request.name: Get Top Exchanges (Full Data) by Pair Volume

description.content: Returns the top exchanges by 24-hour pair volume with full ticker data per exchange.

query.description: Number of rows to return (max varies per endpoint, typically 100).

item.name: Get All Exchanges and Trading Pairs

request.name: Get All Exchanges and Trading Pairs

description.content: Returns the full list of integrated exchanges and the trading pairs each exchange currently exposes.

response.name: Map of exchange name to traded pairs.

description.content: Returns descriptive metadata, ranking grade, country, URL, and feature flags for every integrated exchange.
On-chain blockchain data including history and balance distribution.
Returns the list of coins that have on-chain blockchain data available (transaction count, active addresses, average transaction value, etc.).
Returns the latest day of on-chain data for a coin including transaction count, average transaction value, active addresses, hashrate, difficulty, and large transaction count.
Returns daily on-chain data history (transaction count, value, active addresses, hashrate, difficulty) for a coin.

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

item.name: Get Historical Daily Blockchain Balance Distribution

request.name: Get Historical Daily Blockchain Balance Distribution

description.content: Returns daily history of on-chain balance distribution buckets for a coin (addresses with 0-0.001, 0.001-0.01, etc., units of the asset).

query.description: Number of data points to return (max 2000 for OHLCV).
Unix timestamp (seconds) to use as the upper bound for the returned window.

description.content: General coin listing, mapping, and reference metadata.
Returns the complete CryptoCompare coin list with mapping, image URLs, algorithm, proof type, supply data, and CCData taxonomy.

description.content:
The CryptoCompare min-api (now CoinDesk Data Legacy API) provides cryptocurrency market data including current and historical prices, OHLCV candles (minute/hour/day), top lists by volume and market cap, news, social statistics, order book data, blockchain data, and exchange information. The REST API is available at https://min-api.cryptocompare.com/data and supports authenticated access via an API key passed either as the api_key query parameter or in the Authorization header. Free-tier traffic is metered in monthly call credits; paid commercial tiers expand the monthly budget and enable additional endpoints such as news, social, blockchain, top lists, and order book.

Contact Support:
 Name: CryptoCompare / CoinDesk Data Support
 Email: data@cryptocompare.com
